name: somi
description: Multi-agent engineering workflow system: plan, code, review — with SOLID/OWASP guardrails, deterministic hooks, and a global ruleset.

commands.name: discover
commands.description: Pre-development discovery (MAX): research competition + author the requirements & design foundation (BRD/SRS/FRD/SDD/TDD) + a dense brief.md for a new product. Feeds /plan.

commands.name: design
commands.description: Feature/user-story design (MAX): settle a brownfield feature's architecture against the codebase and compile the brief.md the cheaper tier executes against. Feeds /plan.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Sequence the design (brief) into a structured engineering plan (phases, risks, DoD, test strategy)

commands.name: plan-loop
commands.description: Bounded plan → review → revise loop. Stops on approve, cap, divergence, or user stop.

commands.name: code
commands.description: Implement against an approved plan with senior-engineer judgment

commands.name: code-loop
commands.description: Bounded code → review → fix loop on a single iteration. Stops on approve, cap, diff cap, circuit breaker, or user stop.

commands.name: code-parallel
commands.description: Fan out provably-independent iterations into isolated git worktrees, then integrate them sequentially behind a gate. Falls back to sequential /code-loop on hosts without worktrees/concurrent sub-agents.

commands.name: review
commands.description: Strict, fresh-context code / plan / design review with severity-graded findings (use `plan <slug>` or `design <slug>`)

commands.name: review-panel
commands.description: Parallel multi-lens review: seats reviewer + security/architecture/test lenses as the diff warrants, merges and de-duplicates findings into one verdict. Runs sequentially on Copilot (no concurrent sub-agents).

commands.name: ship
commands.description: Full plan → code → review pipeline against a problem statement. Code iterations run under /code-loop's caps.

commands.name: ship-loop
commands.description: Continuous MAX→ECO pipeline: optional MAX front-load → [single gate at the model switch] → /plan-loop → /code-loop, run under bounded caps.

commands.name: security-review
commands.description: Security-focused review: auth, crypto, input validation, injection risks

commands.name: architecture-review
commands.description: Architectural review: boundaries, contracts, dependency direction, reversibility

commands.name: test-strategy
commands.description: Test-strategy review: risk-driven coverage, level selection, mock policy, determinism

commands.name: refactor
commands.description: Untangle complex code before patching antipatterns
